html[lang] attribute set by the layout\n        function isHrCulture() {\n            var lang = (document.documentElement.lang || \u0027hr\u0027).toLowerCase();\n            return lang.startsWith(\u0027hr\u0027);\n        }\n\n        function pad(n) { return n \u003c 10 ? \u00270\u0027 + n : \u0027\u0027 + n; }\n\n        // ÔöÇÔöÇ Format a Date object into the culture-correct string ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n        function formatDateTime(date, hour, min, ampm) {\n            var h = parseInt(hour, 10);\n            var m = parseInt(min, 10);\n            if (!isHrCulture()) {\n                // en-US: 12-hour with AM/PM\n                var hh = h % 12 || 12;\n                return pad(date.getMonth() + 1) + \u0027/\u0027 + pad(date.getDate()) + \u0027/\u0027 + date.getFullYear()\n                    + \u0027 \u0027 + pad(hh) + \u0027:\u0027 + pad(m) + \u0027 \u0027 + ampm;\n            }\n            // hr: 24-hour\n            return pad(date.getDate()) + \u0027.\u0027 + pad(date.getMonth() + 1) + \u0027.\u0027 + date.getFullYear()\n                + \u0027 \u0027 + pad(h) + \u0027:\u0027 + pad(m);\n        }\n\n        // ÔöÇÔöÇ Build / rebuild the calendar grid ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n        function renderCalendar(id) {\n            var s = cdpState[id];\n month, 1).toLocaleString(\u0027default\u0027, { month: \u0027long\u0027, year: \u0027numeric\u0027 })\n            );\n\n            var daysEl = $(\u0027#cdp-days-\u0027 + id).empty();\n\n            // Leading blanks ÔÇö week starts Monday\n            var firstDow = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay(); // 0=Sun\n            var blanks = (firstDow === 0) ? 6 : firstDow - 1;\n            for (var b month === today.getMonth() \u0026\u0026 year === today.getFullYear())\n                    cls += \u0027 cdp-today\u0027;\n                if (s.selectedDate \u0026\u0026 d === s.selectedDate.getDate()\n                    \u0026\u0026 month === s.selectedDate.getMonth()\n                    \u0026\u0026 year  === s.selectedDate.getFullYear())\n                    cls += \u0027 cdp-selected\u0027;\n\n                daysEl.append(\n                    $(\u0027\u003cdiv\u003e\u0027).addClass(cls).text(d)\n                        .data(\u0027day\u0027, cdpState[id];\n            if (!s.selectedDate) {\n                var now = new Date();\n                s.viewYear  = now.getFullYear();\n                s.viewMonth = now.getMonth();\n            } else {\n                s.viewYear  = s.selectedDate.getFullYear();\n                s.viewMonth = s.selectedDate.getMonth();\n            }\n            renderCalendar(id);\n            updateTimeDisplay(id);\n            // AM/PM visibility\n            var ampmWrap = $(\u0027#cdp-ampm-wrap-\u0027 + id);\n            isHrCulture() ? ampmWrap.hide() : ampmWrap.show();\n\n function closePanel(id) {\n            var panel = $(\u0027#cdp-panel-\u0027 + id);\n            panel.stop(true, true).fadeOut(130).attr(\u0027aria-hidden\u0027, \u0027true\u0027);\n            cdpState[id].open = false;\n        }\n\n        function updateTimeDisplay(id) {\n            var s = cdpState[id];\n            $(\u0027#cdp-hour-\u0027 + id).text(pad(s.hour));\n    function commitValue(id) {\n            var s = cdpState[id];\n            if (!s.selectedDate) return;\n            var formatted = formatDateTime(s.selectedDate, s.hour, s.min, s.ampm);\n            $(\u0027#\u0027 + id).val(formatted);                      // hidden\n            $(\u0027#\u0027 + id + \u0027_display\u0027).val(formatted);         // visible text\n        }\n\n        // ÔöÇÔöÇ Initialise a single picker instance ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n        function initPicker(id) {\n            if (cdpState[id]) return; // already initialised\n\n            // Parse any pre-existing value\n            var hiddenVal = $(\u0027#\u0027 + id).val();\n            var parsed = hiddenVal ? parseFormattedDate(hiddenVal) : null;\n\n            cdpState[id] = {\n                open:         false,\n                selectedDate: parsed ? parsed.date : null,\n                viewYear:     parsed ? \u0027AM\u0027;\n            // Try hr format:  dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm\n            var mHr = str.match(/^(\\d{1,2})\\.(\\d{1,2})\\.(\\d{4})\\s+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})$/);\n            if (mHr) {\n Our custom\n  datepicker and AjaxAutocomplete widgets store their bound values in hidden\n  inputs, so that default prevents on-blur validation from ever firing on them.\n\n  The fix must happen SYNCHRONOUSLY, right after jquery.validate.js is parsed\n  and before jquery.validate.unobtrusive.js loads.  Unobtrusive registers a\n  $(document).ready() handler that eventually calls $form.validate(), creating\n  the validator instance.  $.validator.setDefaults() only affects instances\n  created AFTER the call, so if we call it before unobtrusive loads, every\n  instance ÔÇö including the auto-parsed one ÔÇö inherits  ignore: \u0027\u0027  and all\n  elements are evaluated regardless of their visibility state.\n\n  A defensive re-apply inside DOMContentLoaded also patches the instance\n  settings directly, guarding against any scenario where validate() was called\n  before our setDefaults executed (e.g., a cached inline script).\n*@\n\n@* ÔöÇÔöÇ 1. Load jQuery Validate ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ *@\n\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jquery-validation@1.21.0/dist/jquery.validate.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\n\n@* ÔöÇÔöÇ 2.
